CorePhysicsKernel: Net intensity I = (-M_sequestered / E) + I_grid, where M_sequestered is mass sequestered and E is energy.
NormalizationAndAggregation: Piecewise-linear corridor map r_carbon = corridor(I; I_safe, I_gold, I_hard) with a strongly negative safe band and positive hard band.

CorePhysicsKernel: Sub-coordinates r_t90 (from t90 = ln(10)/k), r_tox (ecotox), r_micro (micro-residue), r_leach (leachate), r_PFASresid (PFAS-like residual).
NormalizationAndAggregation: Convex aggregation r_materials = sqrt(sum_i w_i * r_i^2) over all materials sub-coordinates, preserving monotonicity in each sub-risk.

CorePhysicsKernel: Sub-coordinates r_conn (from connectivity index), r_comp (from structural complexity), r_colon (from colonization score).
NormalizationAndAggregation: Inverse-good corridor maps (higher ecological quality → lower risk) followed by quadratic aggregation r_bio = sqrt(w_c * r_conn^2 + w_s * r_comp^2 + w_o * r_colon^2).
